item.title: Don’t Miss This Hook of the Week
item.description: This week’s featured forged hook stands out for its design and craftsmanship. See the build process, details, and why it’s worth a closer look.

media:content.media:title: Don’t Miss This Hook of the Week
media:content.media:description: This week’s featured forged hook stands out for its design and craftsmanship. See the build process, details, and why it’s worth a closer look.

item.title: Forging the Back Plate for Quilt Square
item.description: Step-by-step forging of a back plate for a quilt square. Learn shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques to create a precise and durable metal piece.

media:content.media:title: Forging the Back Plate for Quilt Square
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step forging of a back plate for a quilt square. Learn shaping, hammering, and finishing techniques to create a precise and durable metal piece.

item.title: Make a Novelty Railroad Spike Knife
item.description: Beginner-friendly guide to forging a novelty railroad spike knife. Learn basic shaping, heat treatment, and finishing techniques in the forge.

media:content.media:title: Make a Novelty Railroad Spike Knife
media:content.media:description: Beginner-friendly guide to forging a novelty railroad spike knife. Learn basic shaping, heat treatment, and finishing techniques in the forge.

item.title: Forging a Simple Bottle Opener
item.description: Step-by-step process of forging a simple bottle opener. Learn basic blacksmithing techniques, shaping methods, and finishing tips for a functional tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Simple Bottle Opener
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step process of forging a simple bottle opener. Learn basic blacksmithing techniques, shaping methods, and finishing tips for a functional tool.

item.title: How to Forge a Blacksmith’s Hammer
item.description: Step-by-step guide to forging a blacksmith’s hammer from raw steel. Watch the shaping, heat treatment, and finishing process to create a durable tool.

media:content.media:title: How to Forge a Blacksmith’s Hammer
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step guide to forging a blacksmith’s hammer from raw steel. Watch the shaping, heat treatment, and finishing process to create a durable tool.

item.title: Repurposing Old Scrap Iron Challenge
item.description: Challenging myself to turn old scrap iron into something useful. Watch the creative process, forging techniques, and final transformation.

media:content.media:title: Repurposing Old Scrap Iron Challenge
media:content.media:description: Challenging myself to turn old scrap iron into something useful. Watch the creative process, forging techniques, and final transformation.

item.title: Building a New Torch Setup + Review
item.description: Putting together a new torch setup and sharing honest reviews. See the components, performance, and whether it’s worth the investment.

media:content.media:title: Building a New Torch Setup + Review
media:content.media:description: Putting together a new torch setup and sharing honest reviews. See the components, performance, and whether it’s worth the investment.

item.title: This Ring Handle Is Super Cool
item.description: Check out this unique ring handle design. See how it’s made, how it functions, and why it’s such a cool addition to any forged project.

media:content.media:title: This Ring Handle Is Super Cool
media:content.media:description: Check out this unique ring handle design. See how it’s made, how it functions, and why it’s such a cool addition to any forged project.

item.title: Blacksmithing DIY: Garden Edition
item.description: DIY blacksmithing projects designed for the garden. Practical, durable, and handcrafted pieces that add function and character to your outdoor space.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmithing DIY: Garden Edition
media:content.media:description: DIY blacksmithing projects designed for the garden. Practical, durable, and handcrafted pieces that add function and character to your outdoor space.
